# Shared constraints for the .venv-train install (pip `-c`), used by BOTH the CI workflow and
# scripts/setup_training.sh. requirements-train.txt pins the headline packages; this file freezes
# the transitive numpy/onnx versions so CI and local resolve identically.
#
# Since issue #126 the train stack moved OFF the old numpy<2 / onnx==1.17.0 hack: godot-rl is now
# installed --no-deps, so its stable-baselines3<=2.4.0 cap no longer forces numpy<2. The stack is
# SB3 2.8.0 + gymnasium 1.2.2 + numpy>=2 + modern onnx (the versions the RLlib backend already
# used), so the ml_dtypes.float4_e2m1fn import crash that pinned onnx to 1.17.0 is gone. These pins
# simply freeze the validated versions for reproducibility. The convert venv (.venv, py3.14) still
# installs WITHOUT constraints. See docs/dev/gotchas.md.
numpy==2.4.6
onnx==1.21.0
